room.caption: [NightmareE1] NZZ again, here to mock you as you struggle with one of my favorite gimmicks.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" Dash Energy seems to recover a bit faster in this map."
bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=320 newMapY=128 toRoom=rMain_39Vault newDraw=1 image_blend=c_black

bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=136 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateE_5 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,5) if instrProg!="7" and instrProg!="9" {instance_destroy()}
image_xscale=48; image_yscale=24 xDir=0 yDir=1 shiftChange=64 doNotPause=0
image_xscale=48; image_yscale=24 xDir=0 yDir=1 shiftChange=64 doNotPause=0
image_xscale=48; image_yscale=24 xDir=0 yDir=1 shiftChange=64 doNotPause=0
